output.code:
with open('/mnt/data/file-3KmLPMPC1vwUCccVC87cY2-text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    text = f.read()
print(text[:500])

# get between quotes
import re
first_quote_content = re.search('\"(.+?)\"', text, re.DOTALL).group(1)
first_quote_content

quotes = re.findall('\"(.+?)\"', text, re.DOTALL)
len(quotes), quotes[:4]

ayah = quotes[0]
hadith = quotes[1]

# find all occurrences of ayah
ayah_matches = list(re.finditer(re.escape(ayah), text))
hadith_matches = list(re.finditer(re.escape(hadith), text))
print(len(ayah_matches), len(hadith_matches))
